commands.review_summary:
The PR preserves nested provider request SecretRef markers in generated `models.json`, strips those markers before runtime transport conversion, and extends `openclaw secrets audit` coverage for request secrets.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current docs support nested provider request SecretRefs, while current main only preserves top-level provider apiKey/header markers in the `models.json` generation path. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
